howItWorks.title: From Registration to Intelligence
howItWorks.description: A purpose-built automated pipeline that detects impostor domains and delivers actionable intelligence to your team instantly.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.description: Scanning 1,500+ TLDs, subdomains, and Certificate Transparency logs 24/7.

steps.title: Enrich
steps.description: Querying DNS records, nameservers, and historical WHOIS data to build a profile.

steps.title: Classify
steps.description: Analyzing fuzzy matches and homoglyphs to distinguish defensive registrations from threats.

steps.title: Alert
steps.description: Pushing instant notifications to your SOC via Webhook or Email for critical matches.

items.description: Detecting fuzzy matches, homoglyphs, and combo-squatting with high-precision algorithms.

hero.title: Turn Malware Logs Into
hero.description: We ingest millions of rows of data from InfoStealer infections (RedLine, Vidar) and hacker forums. We instantly map these compromised credentials to your actual users, allowing for proactive defense.

valueProps.title: Stop Takeovers
valueProps.description: Standard security reacts to failed login attempts. We act earlier, identifying compromised users the moment their device is infected by malware.

items.title: Ingest Malware Logs
items.description: Direct access to real-time streams from RedLine, Vidar, and Raccoon stealer clouds. We catch the data before it hits public forums.

items.title: Precise User Matching
items.description: We parse messy raw logs and map compromised credentials directly to your customer database with high-fidelity matching.

items.title: Pre-Auth Remediation
items.description: Invalidate sessions and force password resets the moment an infection is detected, stopping hackers before they even try to login.

items.title: Automated Defense
items.description: Integrate via API to trigger instant defensive workflows without manual intervention whenever a user is compromised.

howItWorks.title: From Infection to
howItWorks.description: Stop account takeovers before the hacker even logs in. We automate the path from raw malware log to user security.

steps.title: Log Collection
steps.description: We stream live logs from malware C2 servers and 'cloud of logs' repositories (RedLine, Vidar, etc).

steps.title: Data Parsing
steps.description: Raw text files are normalized. We extract URLs, usernames, passwords.

steps.title: Identity Check
steps.description: Extracted credentials are cross-referenced against your user base to identify compromised customers.

steps.title: Force Reset
steps.description: API triggers an immediate password reset for the affected user, invalidating the stolen credentials.

steps.title: Warn the User
steps.description: Notify the user for cybersecurity awareness.

capabilities.title: Secure Accounts From
capabilities.description: We bridge the gap between malware infections and your authentication system, stopping hackers from using stolen credentials to access your platform.

items.title: Ingest Malware Logs
items.description: Connect directly to info-stealer command & control (C2) servers. We pull raw logs from RedLine, Vidar, and Raccoon infections in real-time.

items.title: Map to Customers
items.description: We correlate raw infection data (usernames, passwords, machine IDs) with your user database to pinpoint exactly who is compromised.

items.title: Block Account Takeover
items.description: Stop credential stuffing attacks at the login gate. If a user's credentials appear in a stealer log, we lock the account instantly.

items.title: Automate Remediation
items.description: Trigger a password reset via API the moment a threat is detected, securing the account without manual intervention.

platform.title: See What Attackers See
platform.description: Continuous dark-web monitoring that turns stealer logs and leaked credentials into actionable intelligence. Detect, prioritize, and remediate faster.
